title: Static Website Planning, Scaffolding, and Visual Iteration

workflow_patterns.title: Plan Mode for Project Scaffolding
workflow_patterns.description: User requests a feature, agent enters plan mode, explores the directory, launches a Plan sub-agent, writes a detailed implementation plan, and exits for user approval before coding.
workflow_patterns.gap: Plan exploration and plan writing repeat boilerplate structure each time; no reusable scaffold template for static-site projects.

workflow_patterns.title: Parallel Multi-File Creation
workflow_patterns.description: Agent creates multiple CSS and JS files in parallel batches, following a predefined directory layout from the plan. Files include design tokens, base styles, layout, components, animations, data, and logic.
workflow_patterns.gap: Each file is written individually with Write tool calls. No templating or scaffolding to generate a standard project skeleton in one step.

workflow_patterns.title: Screenshot-Feedback-Fix Cycle
workflow_patterns.description: Agent deploys site locally, takes Playwright screenshot, user reviews and reports issues (wrong images, broken modal), agent fixes and re-screenshots to verify.
workflow_patterns.gap: Each screenshot-review-fix iteration requires manual Playwright script writing and re-execution. No structured visual regression workflow.

workflow_patterns.title: Sub-Agent Delegation for Research
workflow_patterns.description: Agent delegates image URL research to a general-purpose sub-agent that performs web searches, then integrates results back into the main session via targeted file edits.
workflow_patterns.gap: Sub-agent research results require manual integration into source files. No structured handoff for asset discovery results.

workflow_patterns.title: Iterative Bug Fix from User Report
workflow_patterns.description: User reports a UI bug (modal close button not working), agent reads source code, identifies missing event listener, applies targeted fix, and confirms resolution.
workflow_patterns.gap: Reactive debugging after deployment. No pre-deployment checklist for interactive UI elements like modals, dropdowns, or forms.

recommendations.rationale: Session builds a polished static website with dark theme, animations, and responsive grid. This skill provides production-grade frontend design patterns and avoids generic AI aesthetics.
User follows a plan-then-implement workflow with detailed multi-file specifications. Blueprint converts objectives into self-contained construction plans executable in isolation.
Session uses Playwright for visual verification after deployment. This skill provides structured web app testing patterns including screenshot comparison and DOM interaction.
User requests visually appealing design with gradients, animations, and curated imagery. Canvas design skills help produce polished visual artifacts.

summary: Single session where the user plans and builds a visually polished recipe book static website from scratch. Workflow progresses through plan mode exploration, parallel file scaffolding (9 files across CSS/JS/HTML), local deployment, Playwright-based visual verification, sub-agent image research, and iterative bug fixing. Five patterns detected: plan-driven scaffolding, parallel file creation, screenshot-feedback loops, delegated research, and reactive bug fixes. Frontend-design and blueprint skills address the core patterns most directly.
user_profile: Frontend developer building static websites with emphasis on visual polish. Uses plan mode for project scoping, Playwright for visual verification, and iterates based on visual feedback and user-reported bugs.
